violations.text: Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the kitchen. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Hand Soap was provided at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/05/2024

A Chlorine Sanitizer Spray bottle was observed not marked with the common name of the chemical. Working containers of chemicals taken from bulk are to be labeled with the common name of the chemical. New Violation. Correct By: 02/05/2024

Chlorine sanitizer solution was observed in excess of 200 parts per million (ppm). A chlorine sanitizer solution applied to food contact surfaces must be between 50-100 ppm. (Sanitizer was adjusted to 50-100ppm at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/05/2024

Working containers of dry ingredients are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. New Violation. Correct By: 02/05/2024
The walk-in cooler door gasket was observed in poor repair (torn/ripped). New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2024

The sink used for food preparation is lacking a proper air gap (currently equipped with an air break). A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2024
